title: Bare Bones X Simple Netherite Horse Armor
description: A texturepack that adds barebone support to the mod Simple Netherite Horse Armor
body: Adds barebones support to the mod Simple Netherite Horse Armor. It changes all of the texture in the mod. The mod could be find [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-netherite-horse-armor)
